title: eriogonum nodosum var. kearneyi
intro: Eriogonum nodosum var. kearneyi, also known as Kearney's buckwheat, is a rare and endemic variety of the Eriogonum nodosum plant species, which is a type of flowering shrub native to California in the United States. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits associated with Kearney's buckwheat include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Eriogonum nodosum var. kearneyi can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
